headline: 3i Group: Cyclical Slowdown Doesn't Change Long-Term Growth Story
summary: 3i Group is upgraded to Strong Buy as its valuation now trades at a rare discount to NAV, despite cyclical headwinds. Read more on TGOPY stock here.
